[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101010 3
1 110000001 3
2 001000010 2
3 110000001 3
4 000110000 2
5 100010100 3
6 101010101 5
7 010101101 5

01 10 100010000 2
12 21 001010000 2
23 32 000000000 a
34 43 000101100 3
45 54 000000000 a
56 65 000000001 1
67 76 001000001 2
70 07 110000000 2

02 20 000010000 1
13 31 000000101 2
24 42 001000000 1
35 53 010000001 2
46 64 001000010 2 match 2
57 75 110000001 3 match 1 3
60 06 000000000 a
71 17 101000101 4

03 30 010100000 2
14 41 001000100 2
25 52 000000000 a
36 63 000000001 1
47 74 001001100 3
50 05 110000000 2
61 16 001000001 2
72 27 001000000 1

04 40 000100000 1
15 51 100000001 2
26 62 001000000 1
37 73 010001101 4
[completion]
